zh.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh.Blackfriars, London, England: 英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Parr於大約1476年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，他的父親Sir William Parr42歲，母親Elizabeth FitzHugh23歲。他於1510年與Maud Green在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1509年被列為sheriff of northamptonshire。他去世於1517年11月11日在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯享年42歲，埋葬在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

zh-hans.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh-hans.Blackfriars, London, England: 英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Parr于大约1476年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾时，他的父亲Sir William Parr42岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzHugh23岁。他于1510年与Maud Green在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1509年被列为sheriff of northamptonshire。他去世于1517年11月11日在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯享年42岁，埋葬在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Parr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Parr in Lancashire, or from residence at an enclosure (Middle English parr, Old English pearr).
German: from Middle Low German parre ‘parish, district, minister's house’; a metonymic occupational name for a parson or for someone who worked in a parsonage or manse. Compare Pfarr .
English: variant of Pear with the common late Middle English and early modern English change of -er- to -ar-.

variants.name: Pare
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri, Laurent, Normand, Fernand, Alphonse, Clermont, Elphege, Alain, Benoit, Gaston, Girard.
French (Paré): occupational name for someone who finished cloth, from the past participle of parer ‘to prepare’.

variants.name: Parman
meanings: Americanized form of German Parmann: variant of Parr .
Possibly an altered form of German Bärmann (see Barmann ).

variants.name: Porr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ulrike, Gunther.
metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of leeks or other vegetables, from Middle High German porre, pforre ‘leek’ (from Latin porrum).

variants.name: Pfarr
meanings: South German: from Middle High German pfarr ‘district, parish’ or pfarre(r) ‘parish priest’, hence an occupational name for a parson, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the parsonage.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Parr was born about 1476, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir William Parr, was 42 and his mother, Elizabeth FitzHugh, was 23. He married Maud Green in 1510, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1509, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as sheriff of northamptonshire. He died on 11 November 1517, in Blackfriars, London, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Parr est né environ 1476, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Parr, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzHugh, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maud Green en 1510, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1509, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of northamptonshire. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1517, à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Parr um 1476 in Kendal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Parr 42 und seine Mutter Elizabeth FitzHugh 23. Er hat 1510 in Northamptonshire, England Maud Green geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1509, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of northamptonshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. November 1517 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Blackfriars, London, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Parr è nato il circa 1476 nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir William Parr, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth FitzHugh, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maud Green nel 1510, nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1509, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of northamptonshire. Morì il 11 novembre 1517, nel Blackfriars, London, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Blackfriars, London, England.

ja.Kendal, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドケンダル
ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.Blackfriars, London, England: イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Parrが約1476年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父Sir William Parrは42歳，母Elizabeth FitzHughは23歳であった。1510年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでMaud Greenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1509年，34歳の時，職業はsheriff of northamptonshireと記録されている。彼は1517年11月11日にイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズで42歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Parr(이)가 대략 1476년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Parr(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzHugh(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Maud Green(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1509년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of northamptonshire이었다. 그는 1517년 11월 11일 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Parr nasceu aproximadamente 1476, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Parr, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzHugh, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Green em 1510, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1509, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of northamptonshire. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1517, em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Parr родился около 1476 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Parr было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzHugh, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Green в 1510 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1509 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of northamptonshire. Он умер 11 ноября 1517 г. в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Parr nació aproximadamente 1476, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Parr, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzHugh, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maud Green en 1510, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1509, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of northamptonshire. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1517, en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.
